title: Emily trails her words like Sam — pattern recognition, Sept 2025
html:
TL;DR

  • A two-line entry Yahir wrote Sept 25 2025: "The manner that Emily trails her words is eerily similar to how Sam did. I've been thinking a lot about how Sam's made me feel. Getting mad at myself for it and making a tab to dissect it. Maybe this is why, this correlation."
  • The note catches itself in the act of doing pattern-recognition on the new partner against the old one — and second-guesses that it might be Yahir's own residual trauma projecting.

Key quote

"Maybe this is why, this correlation."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Pivot point in the Sam-Emily arc:
    • 2024 04 27 sam breakup script (the rupture)
    • 2024 07 06 dont want to exactly admit it bc it feels like im succumbing (Sam-residue 3 months out)
    • 2025 04 25 restraining order lawyer (legal)
    • 2025-09-25-emily-trails-words-like-sam (now Emily exists, comparing involuntarily)
    • 2026 03 24 alignment misalignment (formal misalignment audit on Emily 6 months later)
  • The "making a tab to dissect it" line is direct evidence Yahir uses Apple Notes / journaling as trauma-processing apparatus — not just idea capture. This summary itself completes that loop by naming it.
  • Yahir's 2024 05 08 biggest lesson post-Sam criterion — "the one will be natural, leave it all on the table" — is silently being applied to Emily here, and the trailing-words tic triggers a pattern-match alert.

Open questions

  • Was the dissection-tab actually written? Worth searching raw/apple-notes/ for an explicit Emily-vs-Sam comparison note.
  • The trailing-words tic — what specifically does it sound like? Yahir doesn't define.

Wikilinks
